comment.use_gpu: Set to false for old GPUs (GTX 550 Ti) - use CPU mode instead
comment.auto_fallback: If GPU fails, automatically fall back to CPU
comment.gpu_preferred_device: GPU device to use: 'auto', 'nvidia', 'amd', 'intel', or specific device name
comment.seeds_per_thread: Number of seeds each GPU thread checks (256-1024 recommended)
comment.max_results: Maximum number of matching seeds to return
